mapper.select: SELECT id, applicant_student_no, name, functionary, type, description, start_time, end_time, duration, status, rejected_reason, created_at, reviewed_at, reviewed_by FROM personal_hour_requests WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, applicant_student_no, name, functionary, type, description, start_time, end_time, duration, status, rejected_reason, created_at, reviewed_at, reviewed_by FROM personal_hour_requests ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, applicant_student_no, name, functionary, type, description, start_time, end_time, duration, status, rejected_reason, created_at, reviewed_at, reviewed_by FROM personal_hour_requests WHERE applicant_student_no = #{applicantStudentNo} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE personal_hour_requests SET name = #{name}, functionary = #{functionary}, type = #{type}, description = #{description}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration = #{duration}, status = #{status}, rejected_reason = #{rejectedReason}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT path FROM personal_hour_request_attachments WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM personal_hour_requests WHERE status = #{status}
